description: Ultra Fantasy Cup team leading Turtonator with Empoleon as the intended safe swap and XL Slurpuff as the anti-meta closer. Slurpuff runs Fairy Wind with Energy Ball and Flamethrower for surprise coverage (over the standard Play Rough) to catch steels and fairies off guard.
performanceNotes: Slurpuff's underrated attack stat wins unexpected CMP ties and lands double super-effective Flamethrower snipes on steels/fortress-types
Empoleon hard-walls Primarina energy and stores Hydro Cannons for cleanup
Turtonator's banked Overheat plus Slurpuff's stored Flamethrower enable strong combo/closing pressure

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: XL Slurpuff is secretly AMAZING in this meta!
